items.title: Anthropic Reports Claude Now Handles 95% of Internal Analytics Queries

items.title: Inside Atlassian’s Forge Billing Architecture for Distributed Usage Tracking at Scale
items.summaryShort: Inside Atlassian’s Forge Billing Architecture for Distributed Usage Tracking at Scale. Atlassian details the Forge billing platform built for usage-based pricing across its cloud ecosystem.

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.summaryShort: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI. At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML.

items.title: AWS Adds Multi-Region Replication to Amazon Cognito Identity Service

items.title: Behind the Scenes: Block 450 JVM Repositories into Monorepo to Reduce Dependency Drift
items.summaryShort: Behind the Scenes: Block 450 JVM Repositories into Monorepo to Reduce Dependency Drift. Block, Inc.

items.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash
items.summaryShort: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash. Claude Guillemot, who founded Ubisoft with his four brothers, has died at the age of 69.

items.title: Polymarket reportedly paid creators to post deceptive videos about fake bets
items.summaryShort: Polymarket reportedly paid creators to post deceptive videos about fake bets. Many of those videos were reportedly filmed on “near-perfect copies” of the Polymarket website, while featuring trades and winnings that were not real.

items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: A new robotaxi scorecard shows China's dominance
items.summaryShort: TechCrunch Mobility: A new robotaxi scorecard shows China's dominance. Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.
